name: build_quadrant_phase3
outcome_goal: Build all 20 quadrant modules in 4 parallel jobs

jobs.label: build_display_modules
jobs.prompt:
You are working in Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/.

Build 7 display modules. Each is a React component that implements QuadrantProps from src/modules/types.ts and registers itself via registerModule from src/modules/moduleRegistry.ts.

Each module uses useModuleData from src/hooks/useModuleData.ts for data fetching. Use the existing primitive components from src/primitives/ internally (MetricCard, DataTable, ChartView, ActivityFeed, StatusGrid, etc).

Dark theme: use CSS variables from src/styles/tokens.css.

Create these files:

src/modules/display/MetricModule.tsx — id: 'metric'
- Config: { endpoint, path, label, format?, color? }
- Fetches endpoint, extracts value at path, renders as large number with label
- format: 'number' (default), 'percent' (multiply by 100, add %), 'currency' (add $)
- If no endpoint, shows config.value directly

src/modules/display/StatRowModule.tsx — id: 'stat-row'
- Config: { endpoint, stats: [{path, label, format?, color?}] }
- Fetches endpoint, renders row of metrics using StatsRow primitive

src/modules/display/ChartModule.tsx — id: 'chart'
- Config: { endpoint, path?, type: 'bar'|'line'|'pie', xKey, yKey, title? }
- Fetches endpoint, passes data to ChartView primitive

src/modules/display/ActivityFeedModule.tsx — id: 'activity-feed'
- Config: { endpoint?, title?, refreshInterval? }
- Default endpoint: /api/platform-overview path recent_dispatches
- Renders ActivityFeed primitive

src/modules/display/StatusGridModule.tsx — id: 'status-grid'
- Config: { endpoint?, title?, columns? }
- Default endpoint: /api/platform-overview path active_models
- Renders StatusGrid primitive

src/modules/display/MarkdownModule.tsx — id: 'markdown'
- Config: { content? } or reads from World path
- Renders markdown as HTML (simple: headers, bold, lists, code blocks)

src/modules/display/KeyValueModule.tsx — id: 'key-value'
- Config: { items: [{label, value}] } or { endpoint, path }
- Renders styled label:value pairs

Also create src/modules/display/index.ts that imports and registers all 7.

All modules must handle loading and empty states gracefully.

jobs.label: build_input_modules
jobs.prompt:
You are working in Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/.

Build 5 input modules for a quadrant grid system. Each is a React TypeScript component.

Import types from src/modules/types.ts:
```typescript
import { QuadrantProps } from '../types';
```

Import registration from src/modules/moduleRegistry.ts:
```typescript
import { registerModule } from '../moduleRegistry';
```

Import the World store from src/world.ts for state writes:
```typescript
import { world } from '../../world';
```

Dark theme CSS variables available: --bg (#0d1117), --bg-card (#161b22), --accent (#58a6ff), --text (#c9d1d9), --text-muted (#8b949e), --border (#30363d), --success (#3fb950), --warning (#d29922), --danger (#f85149), --radius (8px), --space-sm/md/lg, --font-mono, --font-sans.

Create these files:

src/modules/input/TextInputModule.tsx — id: 'text-input'
- Config: { placeholder?, worldPath?, onSubmitEndpoint? }
- Renders a styled text input. On change, writes value to World at worldPath. On Enter, optionally POSTs to onSubmitEndpoint.
- Style: full width, dark bg, border, padding 12px, font-size 14px

src/modules/input/IntentBoxModule.tsx — id: 'intent-box'
- Config: { placeholder? }
- Large text input with 'Ask' button. On submit, POSTs to /api/manifests/generate (or similar) with {intent: text}
- Shows a loading spinner then the response below the input
- Style: prominent, centered, this is the main entry point for the app builder

src/modules/input/DropdownSelectModule.tsx — id: 'dropdown-select'
- Config: { endpoint?, options?, label?, worldPath? }
- If endpoint: fetches options from API. If options: uses static list.
- On select, writes to World at worldPath
- Style: dark select element matching the theme

src/modules/input/ButtonRowModule.tsx — id: 'button-row'
- Config: { actions: [{label, variant?: 'primary'|'danger'|'default', endpoint?, worldWrite?}] }
- Renders a row of styled buttons. Each button either POSTs to endpoint or writes to World.
- Variants: primary (accent color), danger (red), default (gray border)

src/modules/input/FileDropModule.tsx — id: 'file-drop'
- Config: { accept?, worldPath?, label? }
- Renders a drag-and-drop zone with dashed border. On file drop, reads file content, writes to World at worldPath.
- Shows filename after drop. Accepts text files by default.
- Style: dashed border, centered icon/text, hover highlight

Also create src/modules/input/index.ts that imports all 5 and calls registerModule for each with type: 'input'.

Every module must register itself like:
```typescript
registerModule({
  id: 'text-input',
  name: 'Text Input',
  type: 'input',
  defaultSpan: '1x1',
  component: TextInputModule,
  description: 'Text input field',
});
```

Handle loading and empty states. Use inline styles (no CSS modules).

jobs.label: build_tool_modules
jobs.prompt:
You are working in Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/.

Build 4 tool modules for a quadrant grid system. Each is a React TypeScript component.

Import types from src/modules/types.ts:
```typescript
import { QuadrantProps } from '../types';
```

Import registration from src/modules/moduleRegistry.ts:
```typescript
import { registerModule } from '../moduleRegistry';
```

Import World store from src/world.ts and useModuleData from src/hooks/useModuleData.ts.

Dark theme CSS variables: --bg (#0d1117), --bg-card (#161b22), --accent (#58a6ff), --text (#c9d1d9), --text-muted (#8b949e), --border (#30363d), --success, --warning, --danger, --radius, --space-sm/md/lg.

Create these files:

src/modules/tool/DispatchFormModule.tsx — id: 'dispatch-form'
- Renders: model dropdown + prompt textarea + Submit button
- Fetches model list from /api/models on mount
- On submit: POSTs to /api/dispatch with {prompt, model}
- Shows result below: succeeded/failed with output preview
- Default span: 2x1

src/modules/tool/SearchPanelModule.tsx — id: 'search-panel'
- Config: { endpoint?, placeholder? }
- Renders: search input + results list below
- Default searches /api/registries/search?q=QUERY
- Results show: name, description snippet, kind badge (UI/Calc/Workflow)
- Debounced search (300ms)

src/modules/tool/DocumentProcessorModule.tsx — id: 'document-processor'
- Config: { chain: string[] } — list of processing step names
- Reads input from World path 'shared.document_content' (written by file-drop module)
- Shows processing pipeline as horizontal steps with status (pending/running/done)
- Each step POSTs to /api/dispatch with appropriate prompt
- Default span: 2x1

src/modules/tool/DataPipelineModule.tsx — id: 'data-pipeline'
- Config: { steps: [{name, endpoint, inputPath, outputPath}] }
- Visual step chain: renders each step as a box with arrow between them
- Status dots: gray=pending, yellow=running, green=done, red=failed
- Steps execute sequentially, each reading from previous output

Also create src/modules/tool/index.ts that imports all 4 and calls registerModule.

Every module registers with type: 'tool'. Handle loading, error, and empty states.

jobs.label: build_composite_modules
jobs.prompt:
You are working in Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/.

Build 4 composite modules that combine display + input for specific platform objects.

Import types, moduleRegistry, world, useModuleData as the other module files do.

Dark theme CSS variables: --bg, --bg-card, --accent, --text, --text-muted, --border, --success, --warning, --danger, --radius, --space-*.

Create these files:

src/modules/composite/WorkflowStatusModule.tsx — id: 'workflow-status'
- Config: { workflowId? }
- Fetches workflow run status from /api/status
- Shows: pass rate as colored bar, active/completed/failed counts, last run timestamp
- Action buttons: Refresh, View Details
- Default span: 2x1

src/modules/composite/BugCardModule.tsx — id: 'bug-card'
- Config: { endpoint? }
- Fetches from /api/bugs
- Shows: bug list with severity badges (P0=red, P1=orange, P2=yellow, P3=gray), status, title
- Click a bug to expand details inline
- Default span: 2x1

src/modules/composite/ModelCardModule.tsx — id: 'model-card'
- Config: { endpoint? }
- Fetches from /api/models
- Shows: grid of model cards with provider icon placeholder, model name, capability tags, status dot
- Click to select (writes to World shared.selected_model)
- Default span: 2x1

src/modules/composite/RegistryBrowserModule.tsx — id: 'registry-browser'
- Shows: search input + 3 tabs (UI Components | Calculations | Workflows)
- Searches /api/registries/search?q=QUERY&type=TAB
- Results show: name, description, category badge
- Default span: 2x2

Also create src/modules/composite/index.ts that imports all 4 and calls registerModule with type: 'composite'.

Handle loading, empty, and error states. Use inline styles matching the dark theme.
